answer: $0 federal tax. Shares acquired in 2016 (after Sept. 27, 2010) qualify for the 100% QSBS exclusion under §1202, and your $8M gain is under the $10M cap (also exempt from AMT and NIIT). Assumes the corporation met QSBS requirements (≤$50M gross assets at issuance, active qualified business, original issuance) — worth confirming with your CPA before the sale.
